events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the side-loaded shackle is a **fail** (high risk) — shackles are rated for in-line pin loading only, and the observed angular side-load (~30-45°) derates capacity and risks bow deformation or sudden failure under ASME B30.26 / OSHA 1926.251. Immediate action is to stop the lift, de-tension, and re-rig in-line before reinspection.
